provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Public Land (Preserved Areas) Regulations.

There shall be kept at the District headquarters of every District, within which any part of a preserved area lies, a register entitled the Preserved Area Native Titles Register in the form set out in the Schedule hereto, and the Administrative Officer in charge of such district shall cause to be recorded therein the particulars of all titles to land within preserved areas in such district to which the provisions of section 5 of the Act apply.

The Administrative Officer shall transmit to the Commissioner for Lands the particulars of titles of land recorded in columns (1) to (6) of the Preserved Areas Native Titles Register.
